title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan founded Corgi, an insurance-tech startup that rebuilt legacy insurance infrastructure from the ground up rather than modernizing existing carriers. Operating outside traditional industry assumptions, they secured $108M in Series A funding and achieved rapid growth to hundreds of millions in projected ARR within two years.
